Secretary, Ministry of , —Member NOTIFICATION Panchayati Raj New Delhi, the 12th October, 2012 21, Director, Wildlife Preservation, “—Member,"; §.0. 2556(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred s of Bavieonmitand by sub-sections (1) and (2) of Section 38L of the Wild Life (Protection) Act, 1972 (53 0f 1972), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests number $.0. 1403(E), dated the 4th September, 2006, narhely :— In the said notification,— (a) for serial numbers 1 and 2 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely :— ‘ *1, ‘The Minister of State (Independent charge) in charge of the Ministry of Environment and Forests 2.
